Our Craft

Baked with patience,
held to an
impossible standard.

Every cookie at Crumble & Co. begins the night before — brown butter resting overnight, chocolate sourced from a single estate in São Tomé. We don't rush. The dough chills for 48 hours. The oven is calibrated to the degree.

Small batch means we bake in quantities that let us care about every single one. If it doesn't clear our threshold, it doesn't leave our kitchen.

48
Hour chill time
6
Cookie signatures
1
Origin chocolate
∞
Batches refused
